bank.retain_mission: Extract tool-evaluation outcomes and workflow-optimization findings across the QA function.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about evaluated tools, decisions made, and workflow improvements that stuck. Ignore exploratory benchmarks.

mental_models.name: Tool Decisions
mental_models.source_query: Which tools have we evaluated, what won, what lost, and why?

mental_models.name: Workflow Improvements
mental_models.source_query: What workflow optimizations have measurably improved cycle time or quality?
